text:
Market today: Tech is shaky, but AI hopes are keeping the bull alive. The real driver for you is still chip sentiment.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (-36.74%), it's leveraged and decaying. QQQ and QQQI are TRIM (-1.3%, -3.67%). SPAL is a NEW position (-55.27%) and is also leveraged and decaying.

Watch: The AI stock selloff (Headline 8) and how it impacts your tech concentration.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions and watch the AI narrative closely.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position. The -36.74% PNL and decay are significant concerns.
SPAL: This leveraged ETF is down -55.27%. Given its nature and current losses, consider trimming or exiting.
No new buys today - hold and watch
